functions.title: Guide Book #81

§7Guide Book #81§r
§lCorrupted Raven§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Hostile
•§lMob type§r: Medium bird, Animal, Monster, Aerial.
•§lSpawns in§r: Corrupted Forest
•§lHealth§r: 16
•§lWalk speed§r: 0.23

•§lFly speed§r: 0.35
•§lImmune to§r: Fall Damage
•§lBreathes in§r: Air
•§lTempted by§r: Arthropod Meat, Chicken, Rabbit, Rat, Squirrel.
•§lPossible drops§r: Black Feather, Bone, XP Orbs.
•§lAggressive toward§r: Players, Chickens, Small mammals,

Scarecrow, Iron Golem, Snow Golem, Player's aggressive tamed mobs.
•§lMelee attack damage§r: 7-8
•Can pick up the food that tempts them and eat it.
•Corrupted Raven carrying food will temporarily stop being aggressive towards the mobs they are
aggressive with; they will avoid them instead.§’
